message:
feat(harness): add frame drop fault injection tests (bd-1pys5.4)

37 test scenarios verify frame drop recovery across 5 categories:
- Single/burst/periodic frame drops with various widgets
- Layout and diff delay simulation
- Post-drop correctness (BLAKE3 checksum parity)
- Edge cases (empty/tiny/large buffers, all-drop, no-drop)
- Stress tests (100-200 frames with random/periodic drop patterns)

Key invariant: frame N+2 after dropping N+1 produces identical buffer
content as presenting N, N+2 directly (no accumulated artifacts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
